changeSet.author: MohamedFouad
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS account_places ( account_id BIGINT NOT NULL, place_id Integer NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT account_place_pkey PRIMARY KEY (account_id, place_id), CONSTRAINT account_id_foreign_key FOREIGN KEY (account_id) REFERENCES app_accounts (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION, CONSTRAINT place_id_foreign_key FOREIGN KEY (place_id) REFERENCES app_places (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION );
